description_long: This is a heavily armored, low-profile all-terrain vehicle with a distinctive angular design and a desert camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features a prominent, forward-mounted cannon and several angular armor plates that provide both protection and a futuristic appearance. Its body is wide and squat, with reinforced side skirts and a sloped front for deflecting impacts. The turret is centrally located and includes additional equipment such as sensors and hatches. The vehicle rides on concealed wheels or treads, optimized for urban and rugged environments. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability, maneuverability, and combat readiness.
description: A camouflaged, angular all-terrain vehicle with a central turret and forward cannon, designed for durability and urban maneuverability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, central cannon, and angular side skirts, emphasizing the vehicle's defensive design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long barrel, turret details, and the layered armor along the body and side skirts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide, angular back and the continuation of the camouflage pattern, with less detail on weaponry.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and angular armor, with visible hatches and equipment.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires appear to have an all-terrain, blocky tread pattern suitable for both urban and off-road surfaces, providing enhanced grip and durability.
